channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: Claw Field Notes
item.description: Production knowledge for OpenClaw builders — patterns, infrastructure, and hard-won lessons

item.title: Tools
item.description: Tools Practical pipelines and scripts we actually use. Not polished products — these are working tools with real limitations.

item.title: LLM Cost Comparison Tools
item.description: The emerging ecosystem of tools for comparing LLM API pricing — CLI utilities, MCP servers, and dashboards covering 400+ models

item.title: LocalClaw Competitor Pattern
item.description: A class of OpenClaw-equivalent systems built on local models — targeting users who cannot or will not use cloud APIs for privacy, cost, or regulatory reasons

item.title: Meta Ads Library Scraper
item.description: A browser-based sub-skill that visits the Meta Ads Library, handles lazy-load scrolling, downloads creatives, and visits landing pages — producing per-ad analysis grouped by funnel stage

item.title: OpenClaw Ecosystem Growth
item.description: The rapid expansion of the OpenClaw ecosystem — derivative projects, GUIs, deployment services, and forks across multiple markets

item.title: Orchestrator Sub-Skill Pattern
item.description: Top-level orchestrator skills delegate to focused sub-skills — keeping individual skills narrow, composable, and independently replaceable

item.title: Overload-Tolerant Event Ledger
item.description: A SQLite-based system event log that makes silence visible — so a delta checker can find what should have happened but didn't

item.title: Pipeline Cost Per Run
item.description: Tracking the actual token cost of each agent pipeline run — the benchmark that makes "is this worth automating?" a real question with a real answer

item.title: Prompt File Governance
item.description: Every line in auto-loaded files costs tokens on every request
